name: Key collector component
description: The `key_collector` component collects key presses from components like [Matrix keypad](https://esphome.io/components/matrix_keypad#matrix_keypad), [Wiegand keypad](https://esphome.io/components/wiegand/) or LVGL [Button Matrix](https://esphome.io/components/lvgl/widgets#buttonmatrix), [Keyboard](https://esphome.io/components/lvgl/widgets#keyboard) widgets. It allows you to process key sequences and treat them as one, for example to allow inputting of a PIN code or a passkey. The component outputs the result of the keypress sequence as a variable usable in automations, and can publish the result to a `text_sensor`.

config_entries.label: End Keys
config_entries.description:
**Required — set at least one of:** `end_keys`, `max_length`.

Keys used to *finish* the key sequence and trigger the `on_result` automation.

config_entries.label: Max Length
config_entries.description:
**Required — set at least one of:** `end_keys`, `max_length`.

The maximum length of the desired key sequence. After this limit is reached, the collector will either ignore additional keys or trigger the `on_result` automation, depending on `end_key_required`.

config_entries.label: Source ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the key collector component to monitor.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Set the ID of this entry for use in lambdas.

config_entries.label: Allowed Keys
config_entries.description: Keys allowed to be used. If not specified, then any otherwise unused keys will be allowed.

config_entries.label: Back Keys
config_entries.description: Keys used to delete the last pressed key. Like *Backspace* on a keyboard.

config_entries.label: Clear Keys
config_entries.description: Keys used to cancel building the key sequence.

config_entries.label: Enable On Boot
config_entries.description: If enabled, this key collector will be enabled on boot. Defaults to `true`.

config_entries.label: End Key Required
config_entries.description: Only trigger `on_result` automation when one of the `end_keys` was pressed, and not when `max_length` characters have been entered. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Min Length
config_entries.description: The minimum length of the desired key sequence. Below this limit, `on_result` automation will not trigger even if any of the `end_keys` was pressed.

config_entries.label: Start Keys
config_entries.description: Keys used to *start* the key sequence; when set, no keys will be accepted until one of the start keys is pressed.

config_entries.label: Timeout
config_entries.description: Timeout after which to cancel building the key sequence.
